title: Didymocarpus forrestii

The Gesneriaceae family is part of the larger order Lamiales, which also includes mint, lavender, and other related plants. The order Lamiales is a clade of flowering plants that are mostly found in temperate and tropical regions. By classification, Didymocarpus forrestii is a monocot, belonging to the division Magnoliophyta.
